# zstack_email_media (Resource)

Manage email media in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the email media.
- `smtp_port` (Number) The SMTP port of the email media.
- `smtp_server` (String) The SMTP server of the email media.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the email media.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The password for SMTP authentication.
- `username` (String, Sensitive) The username for SMTP authentication.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the media.
- `type` (String) The media type.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the email media.
